name: Enomoto Co.,Ltd.
summary: Enomoto Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells LED lead frames for semiconductors in Japan and internationally. The company provides lead frames for IC, transistor, LED, electronic parts, etc. It also provides pressed parts for connectors, lead frame molded products, and insert molded products and mold parts, as well as connectors and relays. In addition, the company engages in the design, development, and manufacture of various precision automobiles and automatic machinery. Enomoto Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Uenohara, Japan.
